description: Note from Ṣadoq b. Moshe Yerushalmi addressed to a dignitary. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Probably Mamluk-era. Reporting on the contents of a consignment of textiles. The numbers are written in Greek/Coptic numerals. Might be related to a dowry. On verso there is piyyut in a different hand. (Information from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: פתק מצדוק בן משה הירושלמי לדיגניטר; ביהודית-ערבית; כנראה מתקופת הממלוכים; דיווח על תכולת משלוח טקסטיל
